programming_intro.label: Programming Languages: Talking to Computers
programming_intro.summary: Learn what a programming language is and why Python is a great first language.

intro.title: Programming Languages: Talking to Computers
intro.bodyMarkdown:
Just like humans communicate with each other using language, we also communicate with computers using programming languages. Computer scientists designed these languages so we can give instructions to a computer in a way it can understand.

There are many programming languages—such as Python, Java, and C—and each one has its own strengths. In this lesson, we’ll focus on Python, one of the most widely used programming languages in the world today.

m0_prog_language_definition.title: Programming language
m0_prog_language_definition.prompt: A **programming language** is best described as:

options.a: A way to give instructions to a computer

m0_prog_language_definition.hint: We use programming languages to give computers instructions.

m0_prog_python_is_language.title: Python
m0_prog_python_is_language.hint: Python is a language used to write programs.

m0_prog_instructions_precise.title: Precision matters
m0_prog_instructions_precise.prompt: Computers usually need instructions that are:

options.a: Vague so they can guess what you mean
